content.problemStatement:
Alice has a collection of songs represented as a string SSS, where each character is a song. A playlist is a contiguous substring of SSS with exactly KKK songs. Alice's favourite song is aaa. She wants to create a playlist that contains the maximum possible number of her favourite song.

Your task is to find and return an integer representing the maximum number of aaa's she can have in a single playlist of size KKK.


Input Format

The first line contains a string SSS.
The second line contains an integer KKK.


Output Format

Print a single integer representing the maximum number of aaa's in any substring of SSS of length KKK.
